3. Boise in a Bottle - pick a photo per line

Tap a photo to choose it (green ring). The gold PICK is my suggestion (pre-selected). Want a different shot? Type in the box (e.g. "Jill brewery", "capitol", "all six") and a strip of matching photos from your whole trip appears below - tap one to make it YOUR PICK (gold ring). If nothing matches, leave the text and I'll go find it - or tap Create 3 to generate three new shots from your words (or the lyric line) straight into the strip (tagged CREATED, pixels stay clean). Tick "keep current" to leave a line unchanged. Everything auto-saves - when done, tap Copy my picks and paste it back to me. Orange @tag = GPS place; blue [names] = who is in the shot (~ = inferred from couples).
Boise in a Bottle”
